shared_properties: Core canvas stays 1920x1080 at 16:9 with the project palette copied in every file.
Background geometry uses 2 px clean outlines and flat fills with soft rim lighting.
differences: This asset defines the static duel hall shell with no collision, no HUD, and no animated timing cues.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Battle scene layout, camera lock, and 1920x1080 duel framing grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Stone hall lighting, wood trim, and magical classroom atmosphere grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Spawn as one SpriteBundle background layer with a fixed Transform at z=0 and no collider components.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/academy_duel_hall_backdrop.png through AssetServer during the Loading state and store the handle inside BattleArtHandles.
runtime_notes: Anchor the image center to x=960 px and y=540 px.
Preserve transparent cutouts for the upper window glow so additive light sprites can stack over the backdrop.
Keep exported bounds at exactly 1920x1080 px to avoid UI anchor drift.

context.role: Static duel environment shell behind all gameplay actors and UI.
context.usage: Visible for the full match from round start through victory or defeat transitions.

deliverables.notes: Single static duel hall background with transparent additive-light cutouts.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas size is exactly 1920x1080 px with transparent pixels only outside the arch-window glow cutouts.
Central duel aisle spans x=640 px to x=1280 px and stays visually open for projectile travel.
Six upper arch windows use #D4AF37 and #FFFACD highlights with no other highlight hex values.
